subject: Donation payment confirmed
htmlTemplate:
Dear donor,

Your donation payment has been confirmed.

Amount: ₹ {{donation.amount}}

Period: {{donationPeriod}}

Paid on: {{paidOn}}

Confirmed by: {{confirmedByName}}

Donation ID: {{donation.id}}
textTemplate: Your donation of ₹ {{donation.amount}} for {{donationPeriod}} was confirmed on {{paidOn}} by {{confirmedByName}}. Donation ID: {{donation.id}}.
